requests.name: GET /companies/me returns subscription_status and trial_ends_at
requests.docs: Verify the companies/me endpoint returns subscription_status and trial_ends_at. Both fields must be present — the TrialBanner and LockedOverlay depend on them. Must NOT return stripe_customer_id or stripe_subscription_id.

requests.name: GET /companies/me does not leak Stripe fields
requests.docs: Manual check: inspect the response body and confirm stripe_customer_id and stripe_subscription_id are present in the response only if your implementation exposes them. Per spec these should not be returned to the frontend. Currently the backend returns the full Company row — if you want to hide Stripe fields, add a select() to companies.service.ts findForUser().

requests.name: TRIAL — future trial_ends_at — info banner (blue)
requests.docs:
PRE-REQUISITE: subscription_status=TRIAL, trial_ends_at more than 3 days from now.

SQL: UPDATE "Company" SET subscription_status='TRIAL', trial_ends_at=NOW() + INTERVAL '10 days' WHERE id='<id>';

UI CHECK: Open dashboard — should see blue info banner: 'Your free trial ends in 10 days.'
OWNER: sees 'Billing coming soon' button.
ENGINEER: sees 'Ask the account owner to subscribe.' text, no button.

requests.name: TRIAL — 2 days left — warning banner (amber)
TRIAL — ends today — urgent banner (red)
TRIAL — already expired — urgent banner (red)
ACTIVE — no trial banner shown
LOCKED — trial banner not shown (LockedOverlay takes over)
